text: Nuno Felix RT @Daimohnds : Stop lying! Here's an actual video posted by the local community in Debel showing the Italian UNIFIL replacing the statue https://twitter.com/Daimohnds/status/2047177447951491203/video/1 A short while ago, in full coordination with the local community of Debel in southern Lebanon, the damaged statue was replaced by IDF troops. The Northern Command worked to coordinate the replacement of the statue from the moment it received the report of the incident. The IDF expresses deep regret over the incident, and is working to ensure that it does not happen again in the future. - Israel Defense Forces tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @Daimohnds ：别撒谎了！这是当地社区在代贝尔（Debel）发布的真实视频，显示意大利联黎部队（UNIFIL）正在更换雕像 https://twitter.com/Daimohnds/status/2047177447951491203/video/1 不久前，在与黎巴嫩南部代贝尔当地社区的充分协调下，受损的雕像已被以色列国防军（IDF）部队更换。北方司令部从接到事件报告的那一刻起，就致力于协调雕像的更换工作。以色列国防军对此次事件深表遗憾，并正在努力确保此类事件未来不再发生。 - 以色列国防军 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah lawmaker Fadlallah: "We want to continue the ceasefire if Israel fully abides by it." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047249335641952388/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 真主党议员法德拉拉（Fadlallah）：“如果以色列完全遵守停火协议，我们也希望继续维持。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047249335641952388/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF spokesman issued an urgent warning to residents of southern Lebanon, saying IDF forces will remain deployed in southern Lebanon during the ceasefire due to ongoing Hezbollah activity. Residents were warned not to move south of a designated security line, avoid the Litani River area along with the Salqin and Suluq valleys, and not return to dozens of villages across the border zone until further notice. The warning covers communities in the Tyre, Bint Jbeil, Marjayoun and surrounding sectors near the Israeli border. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军发言人向黎巴嫩南部居民发出紧急警告，称由于真主党的持续活动，以色列国防军部队将在停火期间继续部署在黎巴嫩南部。居民被警告不要移动到指定安全线以南，避开利塔尼河（Litani River）地区以及萨尔金（Salqin）和苏卢克（Suluq）山谷，并且在另行通知前不要返回边境地区的数十个村庄。该警告涵盖了提尔（Tyre）、宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）、马尔杰永（Marjayoun）及以色列边境附近周边地区的社区。 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW: A Palestinian terrorist threw stones at vehicles on a main road in the Shomron area, injuring a 5 year old Israeli child. Forces launched a manhunt and imposed a closure on the Palestinian town Madama village in Judea and Samaria. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息：一名巴勒斯坦恐怖分子在撒马利亚（Shomron）地区的一条主干道上向车辆投掷石块，导致一名5岁的以色列儿童受伤。部队已展开搜捕行动，并对犹大和撒马利亚地区的巴勒斯坦城镇马达马村（Madama village）实施了封锁。 推文

text: Open Source Intel ANOTHER OBSTACLE TO IRAN TALKS An Iranian source told Hezbollah linked Lebanese outlet Al Akhbar that Tehran informed Pakistan’s mediator the Lebanon clause is non negotiable, and it must be a clause that in any deal with the U.S. - Israel must have a ceasefire with Hezbollah. The mediator relayed a U.S. response saying direct Lebanon Israel talks would resolve the matter faster, and Washington does not want Lebanon included in negotiations with Iran. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗谈判的又一障碍：一位伊朗消息人士告诉与真主党有关联的黎巴嫩媒体《Al Akhbar》，德黑兰已通知巴基斯坦调解人，黎巴嫩条款是不可谈判的，并且必须作为与美国达成的任何协议中的一项条款——即以色列必须与真主党停火。调解人转达了美国的回应，称黎巴嫩与以色列直接谈判会更快解决问题，华盛顿不希望将黎巴嫩纳入与伊朗的谈判中。 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel At least 6 U.S. scientists and researchers with ties to NASA, MIT, Caltech, and national security labs have died under unusual or unclear circumstances since 2022. Five others are missing. Dead: • Jason Thomas, Novartis pharmaceutical researcher, cancer treatments. Body found in Lake Quannapowitt, MA. March 17, 2026. • Carl Grillmair, Caltech astrophysicist, worked on NASA's NEOWISE and NEO Surveyor missions. Shot outside his home. February 16, 2026. • Nuno Loureiro, Director of MIT's Plasma Science and Fusion Centre. Fatally shot outside his home. December 16, 2025. • Frank Maiwald, Principal researcher at NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory. Died July 4, 2024. Cause unknown. • Michael David Hicks, NASA JPL research scientist, worked on the DART Project and Deep Space 1 mission. Died July 30, 2023. Cause unknown. • Amy Eskridge, Researcher of anti-gravity technology and extraterrestrial life. Died June 11, 2022. Ruled self-inflicted gunshot wound. Missing: • William "Neil" McCasland, Former U.S. Air Force Major General. Missing since February 27, 2026. Last known hiking in Sandia Mountains, NM. • Steven Garcia, Government contractor at Kansas City National Security Campus, Albuquerque, NM. Missing since August 28, 2025. • Anthony Chavez, Former employee of Los Alamos National Laboratory. Missing since May 8, 2025. • Melissa Casias, Administrative officer at Los Alamos National Laboratory. Missing since June 26, 2025. • Monica Reza, Materials processing director at NASA's Jet Propulsion Laboratory. Missing since June 22, 2025. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel 自2022年以来，至少有6名与美国国家航空航天局（NASA）、麻省理工学院（MIT）、加州理工学院（Caltech）和国家安全实验室有联系的美国科学家和研究人员在异常或不明情况下死亡。另有5人失踪。死亡名单：• Jason Thomas，诺华制药研究员，癌症治疗领域。2026年3月17日尸体在马萨诸塞州夸纳波威特湖（Lake Quannapowitt）被发现。• Carl Grillmair，加州理工学院天体物理学家，曾参与NASA的NEOWISE和NEO Surveyor任务。2026年2月16日在其家门外被枪杀。• Nuno Loureiro，麻省理工学院等离子体科学与聚变中心主任。2025年12月16日在其家门外被枪杀。• Frank Maiwald，NASA喷气推进实验室（JPL）首席研究员。2024年7月4日去世。死因不明。• Michael David Hicks，NASA JPL研究科学家，曾参与DART项目和深空1号任务。2023年7月30日去世。死因不明。• Amy Eskridge，反重力技术和外星生命研究员。2022年6月11日去世。被裁定为自杀枪伤。失踪名单：• William "Neil" McCasland，前美国空军少将。自2026年2月27日起失踪。最后一次露面是在新墨西哥州桑迪亚山脉（Sandia Mountains）徒步旅行。• Steven Garcia，新墨西哥州阿尔伯克基堪萨斯城国家安全园区的政府承包商。自2025年8月28日起失踪。• Anthony Chavez，洛斯阿拉莫斯国家实验室前员工。自2025年5月8日起失踪。• Melissa Casias，洛斯阿拉莫斯国家实验室行政官员。自2025年6月26日起失踪。• Monica Reza，NASA喷气推进实验室材料加工主管。自2025年6月22日起失踪。 推文

text: Open Source Intel RT @Osint613 : I wish I understood what actually happened on Friday. Trump posted that Iran agreed to hand over all nuclear material, never close the Strait of Hormuz, end its nuclear program forever, and abandon its proxies. But Iran didn’t agree to any of it. We know that because they didn’t even agree to show up to talks. So what actually happened behind the scenes? Pakistan giving over wrong info? tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 转发 @Osint613 ：我真希望我能明白周五到底发生了什么。特朗普发帖称伊朗同意移交所有核材料、绝不关闭霍尔木兹海峡、永远结束其核计划并放弃其代理人。但伊朗并没有同意其中的任何一点。我们知道这一点，因为他们甚至没有同意参加谈判。那么幕后到底发生了什么？是巴基斯坦提供了错误的信息吗？ 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @NathalieLoiseau : Qui sont les amis du RN en Europe - suite ? Aujourd’hui on vous propose Antonio Tanger Correa, qui vient de poster le tweet ci-dessous. Qui est-il ? Récapitulatif 👉🏻 : https://www.liberation.fr/international/europe/antonio-tanger-correa-tete-de-gondole-de-lextreme-droite-portugaise-aux-multiples-casseroles-20240506_FQZFLQB5XFGEXNGQ7ARTGRSJQU/ Um momento simbólico: uma fotografia da família dos PATRIOTAS, com André Ventura, líder da direita portuguesa e futuro Primeiro-ministro de Portugal, e com Jordan Bardella, Presidente do grupo Patriots for Europe! Um momento histórico! #CHEGA #Patriotas #StudyDays #Porto https://twitter.com/tangercorreamep/status/2046936676216324329/photo/1 - António Tânger Corrêa tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @NathalieLoiseau ：谁是欧洲国民联盟（RN）的朋友——续？今天我们向您介绍安东尼奥·坦格·科雷亚（Antonio Tanger Correa），他刚刚发布了下面的推文。他是谁？总结 👉🏻 ： https://www.liberation.fr/international/europe/antonio-tanger-correa-tete-de-gondole-de-lextreme-droite-portugaise-aux-multiples-casseroles-20240506_FQZFLQB5XFGEXNGQ7ARTGRSJQU/ 一个象征性的时刻：一张爱国者家族的照片，有葡萄牙右翼领导人、未来葡萄牙总理安德烈·文图拉（André Ventura），以及“欧洲爱国者”组织主席乔丹·巴尔德拉（Jordan Bardella）！一个历史性的时刻！ #CHEGA #Patriotas #StudyDays #Porto https://twitter.com/tangercorreamep/status/2046936676216324329/photo/1 - António Tânger Corrêa 推文

text: 🇯🇵 🇺🇦 Tokyo is not considering the possibility of supplying lethal weapons to Kiev, the Japanese Embassy in Russia stated. They noted that Japan has not signed an agreement with Ukraine on the transfer of defense equipment and technologies, so Kiev cannot be its recipient. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Nuno Felix These people think we are stupid….. Iran's rulers proclaim "a right to enrich" because they know credulous Americans and European will say: "Well, if it's their right, we can't interfere with that! We favor rights!!!" What Iran's rulers really mean: "We have a right to wage jihad, to exterminate Israelis along with other infidels, heretics, and apostates, and, in time, fulfill our longstanding mission, policy, and vow: "Death to America!" Would credulous Americans and European object to that? Some would. Not sure how many. - Clifford D. May tweet
text_zh: 努诺·费利克斯（Nuno Felix）这些人以为我们很蠢……伊朗统治者宣称拥有“浓缩铀权利”，因为他们知道轻信的美国人和欧洲人会说：“好吧，如果这是他们的权利，我们就不能干涉！我们支持权利！！！”伊朗统治者真正的意思是：“我们有权发动圣战，有权消灭以色列人以及其他异教徒、异端和叛教者，并最终实现我们长期的使命、政策和誓言：‘打倒美国！’”轻信的美国人和欧洲人会反对吗？有些人会。不知道有多少人会反对。——克利福德·D·梅（Clifford D. May）推文

text: WarMonitor Sen. Patty Murray says Republicans are using their majority to push $70 billion for ICE in the middle of the night while leaving families with nothing. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047235937487167985/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 战争监测（WarMonitor）参议员帕蒂·默里（Patty Murray）表示，共和党人正在利用他们的多数席位在深夜强行通过为美国移民及海关执法局（ICE）提供 700 亿美元的拨款，而让家庭一无所有。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047235937487167985/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🇱🇧⚡️🇮🇱 Another Lebanese journalist has been killed in an Israeli strike Al-Akhbar correspondent Amal Khalil, who had been courageously documenting the Israel – Hezbollah conflict since October 2023, was killed while reporting on the latest escalation – another…" 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 In an interview recorded before she was killed by Zionist regime, Amal Khalil revealed that she received direct death threats from the Mossad on her phone. "I received direct threats targeting me on my phone from the Mossad, from the Israelis, and they threatened to kill me. They were literally saying they would sever my head from my shoulders if I didn’t leave south Lebanon" Undeterred, she continued fearlessly reporting on Israeli aggression in her homeland for the Lebanese newspaper Al-Akhbar, refusing to let enemy threats silence her voice or allow Israel to dictate the narrative on Lebanese soil. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“🇱🇧⚡️🇮🇱 又一名黎巴嫩记者在以色列的袭击中丧生。《Al-Akhbar》通讯员阿迈勒·哈利勒（Amal Khalil）自 2023 年 10 月以来一直勇敢地记录着以色列与真主党之间的冲突，她在报道最新升级局势时遇难——又一个……” 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 在被犹太复国主义政权杀害前录制的一次采访中，阿迈勒·哈利勒透露，她曾通过手机收到摩萨德（Mossad）的直接死亡威胁。“我通过手机收到了来自摩萨德、来自以色列人的直接威胁，他们威胁要杀了我。他们直言不讳地说，如果我不离开黎巴嫩南部，他们就会把我的头从肩膀上砍下来。”她没有被吓倒，继续无畏地为黎巴嫩报纸《Al-Akhbar》报道以色列对她祖国的侵略，拒绝让敌人的威胁使她的声音沉默，也不允许以色列在黎巴嫩土地上左右舆论。🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广

text: 📕 #Комикс от Рыбаря №75: Выжить под землей. Спасение с риском для жизни. Декабрь 2025 года, Красноармейск. Штурм частного сектора превращается в бойню. В живых остаются двое — Кама и Ворон. Под огнём и атаками FPV-дронов тяжело раненный Кама попадает под завал, Ворон — исчезает. Ночью тишину нарушают стоны. Их слышит пожилой местный житель Николай. Понимая, что под завалами человек, Николай решает действовать, несмотря на близость позиций противника. Любое движение может его выдать. Времени мало — Николаю предстоит сделать выбор. 📎 Скачать комикс можно по ссылкам: RU | EN . #Россия #Украина ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📕 #Rybar漫画 第75期：地下生存。冒着生命危险的营救。2025年12月，红军城。对私人住宅区的突击演变成了一场屠杀。只有两人幸存——卡马（Kama）和沃龙（Voron）。在炮火和FPV无人机的攻击下，身受重伤的卡马被困在废墟下，沃龙则下落不明。夜深人静时，呻吟声打破了寂静。当地的一位老居民尼古拉听到了声音。意识到废墟下有人，尼古拉决定采取行动，尽管敌方阵地近在咫尺。任何动作都可能暴露他的位置。时间紧迫——尼古拉必须做出选择。 📎 可通过以下链接下载漫画：俄语版 | 英语版 。 #俄罗斯 #乌克兰 ✈️ 俄语版 | ✈️ 英语版 | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Zen 💸 支持我们

text: 🇮🇷 Iran has for the first time received income from fees for the passage of ships through the Strait of Hormuz, it was announced in the parliament. The funds went to the country's central bank. The exact amount was not disclosed. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 据议会宣布，伊朗首次收到了船只通过霍尔木兹海峡的通行费收入。这笔资金已汇入该国中央银行。具体金额未披露。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarMonitor Not reading all that, but from what I’m seeing, it's just crazy claims about immigrants, attacks on the courts and the ACLU, and a push to end birthright citizenship... basically an unconstitutional racist rant framed as an urgent national threat. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047233506351198306/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 我没读完那些内容，但从我看到的情况来看，这只是一些关于移民的疯狂言论，对法院和美国公民自由联盟（ACLU）的攻击，以及推动终止出生公民权……基本上是一场被包装成紧急国家威胁的违宪种族主义咆哮。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047233506351198306/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Reza Pahlavi: "As long as this regime is in place, you will continue to face these threats. And they will only get worse. No deal will solve this. They are different faces of the same machine." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047230046230724868/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet

text: Nuno Felix This “vassal” state of mind is impressive The EU is overburdened. Every crisis leads to calls for "Europe to act". But that coherent Europe that could act forcefully is only a fantasy. In the real world, different states have different views and interests. And are not willing to abandon them in the name of "Europe". - Ulrich Speck tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 这种“附庸”心态令人印象深刻。欧盟负担过重。每一次危机都会引发“欧洲必须采取行动”的呼声。但那个能够强力行动的、连贯的欧洲只是一个幻想。在现实世界中，不同的国家有不同的观点和利益，并且不愿以“欧洲”的名义放弃这些利益。—— Ulrich Speck 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @Mr_Andrew_Fox : Dude. Allow me a rebuttal. 1. The claim of a tidy “six-week project” ignores the actual sequencing. The opening decapitation strike was clearly designed to collapse the regime early, with follow-on airpower intended to finish the job. That objective failed. The failure to secure the Strait of Hormuz led us to an improvised strategic shift under pressure: a deteriorating economic picture driven by Hormuz disruption, shipping risk premiums, and energy volatility forced a ceasefire attempt that did not stabilise markets. This is strategic dislocation. Trump is stuck in a mess without an exit ramp. 2. The idea that Donald Trump “knows how to negotiate a good deal” is not supported by his record in complex international bargaining. The Doha Agreement with the Taliban collapsed into strategic failure in Afghanistan. His Gaza interventions have not produced a durable settlement. Ukraine diplomacy has yielded no settlement framework. The only tangible deal—hostage releases— depended on third-party leverage via Qatar and Turkey, not a negotiated end state. 3. “The cards are in Trump’s hands” overstates US leverage. Sanctions and maritime pressure do impose costs, but they have not historically produced regime collapse in Iran. The IRGC has built a sanctions-resilient economy over decades and is repeatedly showing that they think time is on their side. Meanwhile, the blockade has reciprocal effects: global energy markets tighten, insurance and freight costs spike, and domestic political pressure mounts on Washington. Time pressure is bilateral, here. 4. Some big assumptions here. Iran has repeatedly absorbed severe shocks, sanctions, inflation spikes, and unrest without systemic collapse. The coercive capacity of the state, fragmentation of opposition, and lack of a coherent alternative leadership all limit the probability that protests translate into regime change. It may work, but someone either needs to arm protesters or someone armed needs to change sides, or we will see mass slaughter again. 5. The argument about third countries joining strikes confuses signalling with strategy. Additional participants do not inherently create “legacy of strength”; they increase escalation pathways and political risk. There remains minimal chance that any other country of note joins in (you might get a Gulf state dropping the odd bomb, but they're on board already so that's irrelevant). Plus, a return to combat means Iran re-opening fire too, and inevitably damaging more Gulf infrastructure, leading to more global economic pressure. 6. Weakening Iran does not linearly produce a favourable outcome in Lebanon. Hezbollah has indigenous capacity, deep entrenchment, and political integration within Lebanon as well as global finance networks. Even degraded external support does not automatically enable the Lebanese Armed Forces to displace it - they are in no position to do so and will not be for some time, if ever. Israeli operations can attrit capability, but the leap to a stable Israeli-Lebanese settlement is not supported by precedent. 7. Hamas retains coercive control in their areas. The notion of a viable “non-Hamas security force” emerging in the near term lacks an military or institutional pathway, and political sponsor with legitimacy on the ground. I've seen the planning for this - it’s an incoherent mess of nothing but contingency planning with no clear direction. External financial networks in Qatar and Turkey are part of the picture, but dismantling them would not, on its own, produce governance replacement inside Gaza - and they’re both Trump’s new chums so their influence will remain. tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @Mr_Andrew_Fox : 伙计，允许我反驳一下。1. 关于“六周计划”的说法忽略了实际的先后顺序。最初的斩首行动显然旨在尽早瓦解政权，随后的空中力量旨在完成任务。该目标失败了。未能确保霍尔木兹海峡的安全导致我们在压力下进行了临时的战略转移：由霍尔木兹海峡中断、航运风险溢价和能源波动驱动的恶化经济形势，迫使我们尝试停火，但这并没有稳定市场。这是战略错位。特朗普陷入了一个没有退路的困境。2. 关于唐纳德·特朗普“知道如何谈成一笔好交易”的观点，并没有他处理复杂国际谈判的记录支持。与塔利班达成的多哈协议在阿富汗演变成了战略失败。他对加沙的干预并没有产生持久的解决方案。乌克兰外交也没有产生任何解决方案框架。唯一实质性的交易——人质释放——依赖于通过卡塔尔和土耳其的第三方杠杆，而不是谈判达成的最终状态。3. “牌在特朗普手中”夸大了美国的杠杆作用。制裁和海上压力确实造成了成本，但历史上它们并没有导致伊朗政权垮台。伊斯兰革命卫队几十年来建立了一个具有制裁韧性的经济体，并一再表明他们认为时间站在他们这一边。与此同时，封锁具有相互影响：全球能源市场收紧，保险和运费成本飙升，华盛顿面临的国内政治压力增加。这里的时间压力是双向的。4. 这里有一些巨大的假设。伊朗一再承受了严重的冲击、制裁、通胀飙升和动荡，而没有发生系统性崩溃。国家的强制能力、反对派的分裂以及缺乏连贯的替代领导层，都限制了抗议活动转化为政权更迭的可能性。这可能会奏效，但要么需要有人武装抗议者，要么需要有武装力量倒戈，否则我们将再次看到大规模屠杀。5. 关于第三国加入打击的论点混淆了信号与战略。额外的参与者并不会从本质上创造“力量的遗产”；他们增加了升级途径和政治风险。其他任何重要国家加入的可能性仍然微乎其微（你可能会看到某个海湾国家投下一两枚炸弹，但他们已经参与其中了，所以这无关紧要）。此外，重返战斗意味着伊朗也会重新开火，并不可避免地破坏更多的海湾基础设施，导致更多的全球经济压力。6. 削弱伊朗并不会线性地在黎巴嫩产生有利结果。真主党在黎巴嫩拥有本土能力、深厚的根基和政治整合，以及全球金融网络。即使外部支持减少，也不会自动使黎巴嫩武装部队能够取代它——他们根本没有能力这样做，如果未来能做到的话，那也是很久以后的事了。以色列的行动可以削弱其能力，但通往稳定的以黎解决方案的飞跃并没有先例支持。7. 哈马斯在其控制区内保持着强制控制。在短期内出现可行的“非哈马斯安全部队”的概念缺乏军事或制度途径，以及在当地具有合法性的政治赞助人。我见过这方面的计划——这是一团混乱的应急计划，没有任何明确的方向。卡塔尔和土耳其的外部金融网络是其中的一部分，但拆除它们本身并不能在加沙内部产生治理替代——而且他们都是特朗普的新伙伴，所以他们的影响力将保持不变。推文
